subcodes.first_line: O captive of chains and shackles, O thou dark steed without a master, O forgiving Lord, what is this golden collar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسیر سلاسل و زنجیر قره کهر بی پیر ای پروردگار آمرزگار این چه طوق زرین است
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for governments and rulers
